steps.title: Translate the phrase
steps.content:
The phrase at most means less than or equal to. The phrase $19$ less than $4$ times $y$ is $4y-19$, so
+$$x\le4y-19$$

steps.title: Substitute the given value
steps.content: Use $y=4$: +$$x\le4(4)-19$$ +$$x\le16-19$$ +$$x\le-3$$ +The greatest possible value of $x$ is $-3$. The answer is -3.
